title: androsace maxima subsp. caucasica
intro: Androsace maxima subsp. caucasica, commonly known as the Caucasian mountain androsace, is a plant species belonging to the primrose family (Primulaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Androsace maxima subsp. caucasica are said to include the potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Androsace maxima subsp. caucasica can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional folk medicine.
